fields.label: Title
fields.name: title
fields.instructions: Optional. Centered above the table (e.g. Side by side).

fields.label: Comparison table
fields.name: comparison_table
fields.instructions: Enable “Use table header”. Row 1 in the editor: column 1 = label (e.g. Feature), other columns = plan names. Body rows: first column = feature name; other cells: type + for included (green dot), - or leave empty for not included (gray dot), or any other text (e.g. 1, Unlimited).
